_meta.adr: ADR-037 modular manifest fragment — never edit src/manifest.json
_meta.description: Learning group cards-collapse (ADR-044): GroupLearning becomes a direct link to the LearningCards landing page. The six former child leaves (Courses, Curriculum, LearningPlans, Assignments, Assessments, Grades) are removed from the menu via menu-layout.json#removals; their pages remain routable via original routes.
